confidence_rationale: Clear view of all transfers and object placements. Task completion clearly visible. Some frames show slight motion blur but object states and peg placements are well-observed throughout.
technique_summary: Expert-level performance with excellent time (44 seconds well within expert 40-60s range). Smooth bilateral coordination and consistent midair transfer technique throughout both directions.
strengths: No dropped objects or penalties incurred
Smooth midair transfers without platform contact
Efficient movement patterns in both directions
improvement_suggestions: Maintain consistency in technique for competition scoring
